promotion.approval: explicit maintainer approval for exact 58-path canonical manifest

blockers: Product candidate is still package version 0.5.1; immutable 0.6.0 release commit does not exist.
The retained DA snapshot predates the Wave 5 C2 public test-plan update and must be refreshed before freeze.
Current strict validators do not resolve tags, reject candidate artifacts in frozen state, or strongly bind snapshot/replay/liveness evidence.
One-shot semantic-release creates v0.6.0 after the point ADR 0003 requires strict tag verification, producing a circular gate.
